---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement or new capability
title: ""
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## What problem should this solve?

Describe the workflow, confusion, or limitation.

## Proposed Direction

Describe the behavior you would like to see.

## Affected Area

Which layer or user surface does this likely touch?

- Adapter / source integration
- Canonical store or event shape
- Analyzer
- CLI
- Dashboard API
- React dashboard
- Documentation

## Privacy Or Trust Considerations

Would this change what gets captured, stored, previewed, revealed, exported, or
sent over the network?

## Alternatives

List any workaround or smaller version of the idea.
